name: UBA : User Account Created and Deleted in a Short Period of Time
notes: Detects when an user account is created and deleted in a short period of time. Note: Only the user deleting the account has an increase in risk score.
bb_references: BB:UBA : User Account Deleted match at least 1 times in 1 day(s) after any of BB:UBA : User Account Created match with the same Account Name (custom)
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when BB:UBA : User Account Deleted match at least 1 times in 1 day(s) after any of BB:UBA : User Account Created match with the same Account Name (custom)
thresholds: when BB:UBA : User Account Deleted match at least 1 times in 1 day(s) after any of BB:UBA : User Account Created match with the same Account Name (custom)
TD_list: APPLY UBA : User Account Created and Deleted in a Short Period of Time on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when BB:UBA : User Account Deleted match at least 1 times in 1 day(s) after any of BB:UBA : User Account Created match with the same Account Name (custom)
RED_list: Event name: UBA : User Account Created and Deleted in a Short Period of Time
